# DispatchIO.CloseFlags

**Structure**

Additional flags to use when closing an I/O channel.

## Declaration

```swift
struct CloseFlags
```

## Close Flags

- **stop**: Stop any in-progress read/write operations when closed.

## Initializing the Type

- **DISPATCH_IO_STOP**: Stop any in-progress read and write operations when closed.

## Closing the File

- **close(flags:)**: Closes the channel to new read and write operations.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
